findings.description: A pothole is visible in the right portion of the frame at the intersection/junction area, showing exposed lighter base material where asphalt has broken away. The hole appears oval-shaped with jagged edges, located on the secondary road surface near where it meets the main highway. Additional road surface deterioration and patching visible throughout the junction area.

A pothole is visible in the center-left of the road surface in images 1 and 2, showing a dark depression with exposed base material and broken asphalt edges. The hole appears approximately 40-50cm in diameter with visible depth where water has pooled, and you can see the irregular broken edges surrounding missing asphalt material.
